column1: The shop assistant finally agreed_________a full refund.
Bill asked me why___________to go shopping with me.
Ellie asked Stan__________to look at the new catalogue.
Stephen___________me he'd bought that suit in a sale.

"What did the man say when you challenged him?"

" He said he _____________pay for the things in his bag, but I didn't believe him!"
When I last saw Carrie, she told me she_________________of buying a house, but now she's changed her mind.

"What did they say when they realised you weren't a shoplifter?"

"They apologised___________me."
